title: Shulker Labels
description: Rename your shulker to any model and render an icon on your box
body:
# Shulker Labels 1.21.5+
Rename your shulker to any model and render an icon on your box
### Usage:
Rename your shulker box in an anvil to the item that u want it to show

**NOTE:** This only supports all models NOT Model Definitions. For a full list look [here](https://github.com/ThatCuteOne/shulker-labels/blob/main/docs/generated/namelist.json)

Example:



![An Anvil where a Shulker gets renamed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00b87a1bfe59c1b28aabb12d513cf848bab6cb95.png)
